Component.Data: { "KeyWidth": 15.0, "DisplayOctaveNumber": false, "LowKey": 12, "HiKey": 108, "CustomGraphics": false, "DefaultAppearance": true, "BlackKeyRatio": 0.699999988079071, "ToggleMode": false, "MidiChannel": 1, "UseVectorGraphics": true, "UseFlatStyle": false, "MPEKeyboard": false, "MPEStartChannel": 2, "MPEEndChannel": 16 }

Component.tooltip: Less "machine-gunning" in exchange for slight inconsistency
Adds a "bite" to the sound. Change this mid-play for more dynamics
Change tone via velocity. Helpful with note-heavy melodies
Gets a guitar left and right. Great for rhythm/riff guitars
Emulates vibrato ranging from 0 to 3.5 semitones. Change this during lead playing for expression. Default mapped to CC1/Modwheel
Controls frequency of vibrato. Default mapped to CC2
Sets range for pitch bend. Setting this to 12 lets you do some cool dive bombs
"All Strings" sounds the most coherent with wide rhythms. "Low String" allows for mellow low tuned riffs
After enabling, press any keyswitch at 120+ velocity to select it as the latch articulation. Any keyswitch with less velocity will be non latching

Component.Data: { "Driver": true, "Device": true, "Output": true, "BufferSize": true, "SampleRate": true, "GlobalBPM": true, "StreamingMode": true, "ScaleFactor": true, "VoiceAmountMultiplier": true, "ClearMidiCC": true, "SampleLocation": true, "DebugMode": true, "UseOpenGL": true, "ScaleFactorList": [ 0.5, 0.75, 1.0, 1.25, 1.5, 2.0 ] }
